parts.description: 3D MMORPG game client with OpenGL immediate mode rendering, Win32 windowing, DirectSound audio, and scene-based state machine.
Network communication layer using MUnique.OpenMU.Network.Packets for TCP packet handling with XSLT-generated bindings.
WinForms tool that syncs game constants between OpenMU server SQL definitions and C++ source files.
In-process debug editor using ImGui for live game state inspection and editing. Compiled via #ifdef _EDITOR.

integration_points.details: C++ loads .NET DLL, resolves function pointers for connection management and packet sending

integration_points.mechanism: [UnmanagedCallersOnly] exports invoked by C++ registered callbacks
integration_points.details: Packet receive handlers in .NET invoke C++ PacketFunctions_*.cpp via registered delegates
XML packet definitions transformed to C++ headers/sources; SQL constants replaced in source files
XML packet definitions transformed to C# extension methods
Editor reads/writes game globals (CHARACTER, ITEM, SKILL) in same address space
